title: Gifbera Colourful Cupcake Cases 400pcs Muffin Cases for Baking Paper Cup Cake Cases for Baking Cups Bun Cases Greaseproof Cupcake Cups, 8 Colors, for Birthdays, Parties, Weddings Decorations
features: 【High-quality materials】Our cupcake case is made of food grade greaseproof paper, which strictly complies with food safety requirements. It is odorless, grease-proof, and can be used with confidence.

【Easy to use】The cupcakes cases are thick and sturdy, allowing for easy shaping while baking cakes. The cake can also be easily removed from the paper, making your cake-making process more convenient.

【No discoloration at high temperatures】Our muffin cupcake cases will not fade or leave pigment residue on the cake even at high temperatures, ensuring that you can enjoy the delicious taste of the cake.

【Standard size】Our baking cases cupcakes are of standard size, with each cake grease-proof paper having a diameter of 7cm at the top, 5cm at the bottom, and a height of 3.5cm. Each package contains 400pcs molds, which are enough for your needs.

【Widely applicable】Our paper cupcake cups can be used for various occasions, including parties, birthdays, weddings, and more. They can also be used for cake decoration, making your cakes more exquisite.
description: Product Description Gifbera - Bake Your World Better Gifbera has been dedicated to offering superior, comfortable and affordable cupcake baking cups and bakeware products to customers around the world. Trust and satisfaction from customers are the most effective motivation for us to make progress. Gifbera - Bake Your World Happy Our cupcake paper is are made of food-grade, grease-proof paper without any added chemicals or other foreign substances. Our cupcake paper is are made of food-grade, grease-proof paper without any added chemicals or other foreign substances. Gifbera is committed to providing high-quality, comfortable, and reasonably priced baking cups and baking products to customers around the world. Gifbera 400pcs Baking Cups Non-stick, Easy-release Made by Food-Safe Greaseproof Paper No Smells, No Poison, No Leaking Dyes High Temperature and Baking Resistance Fits Standard Cupcake/Muffin Pans 5cm base diameter 7cm top diameter, 3.5cm height Food grade greaseproof paper The cupcake cases are made of natural food grade paper, natural oil-proof lining, durable and odorless. They can effectively prevent the oil from leaking out, allowing you to enjoy the cake to the fullest. Easy to release Just pull the cupcake paper and you have a whole cupcake. Whether it's in the oven, microwave, steamer, or freezer, you can use these cup cake cases. Do not fade Mini cupcake paper liners won't fade, warp or stick during baking and can withstand oven temperatures up to 428°F (220°C). You just have to enjoy healthy baking. Enjoy Your Baking Fun Use these paper cupcake cases to create fabulous cupcakes with kids, friends, and customers, and are also great for serving candy, nuts, cookies, desserts, fruit, and more. Cupcake paper cups are perfect for every special occasion throughout the year, the best choice for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, holiday parties, themed celebrations.
